query: SELECT DATABASE() as current_db, VERSION() as tidb_version;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zhFTwZdMBa685Cr.4d37142b48ab --database FiS5WF2NaftJTm6fu3BYQb --execute SELECT DATABASE() as current_db, VERSION() as tidb_version;
